title: Medical use of cannabis - Canada.ca
content:
## Medical use of cannabis
Accessing cannabis for medical purposes and the process for applying to be a licensed producer.

## Services and information

### Using cannabis for medical purposes
General information, choosing a product, using a product, potential side effects.

### Getting cannabis for medical purposes
How to access cannabis for medical purposes, application forms, medical document.

### Apply to be a licensed producer
Checklist, guidelines, security clearance and third-party consent form.

### Regulations for licensed producers
Import and export, production and safety, medical documents, ethical conduct and advertising rules.

### Prescribing cannabis to patients
Information for health care professionals.

### Cannabis health effects and risks
Long-term, short-term, physical and mental health effects of cannabis, impairment, safety, addiction.

### Growing cannabis for your own medical purposes
Application for production of cannabis for own medical purposes, facts about registration, safety considerations.

### For registered persons
Requirements for possessing, storing and producing cannabis products for medical purposes.

### For law enforcement and municipalities
Access and authorized activities under the new regulations.
